narrative:
Mariemont B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,433 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
